parameters.query:
-- Detect patterns from recent ship changes (last 7 days)
-- Pricing changes
SELECT 
  experiment_surveillance.detect_pattern(
    'pricing_tracker',
    'pricing_changes',
    pc.id,
    pc.company_id,
    'pricing',
    pc.change_type,
    pc.change_details
  ) AS pattern_id,
  'pricing' AS source
FROM pricing_tracker.pricing_changes pc
WHERE pc.detected_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND pc.significance = 'major'

UNION ALL

-- Proof changes
SELECT 
  experiment_surveillance.detect_pattern(
    'proof_tracker',
    'proof_changes',
    pc.id,
    pc.company_id,
    pc.page_type,
    pc.change_type,
    pc.change_details
  ) AS pattern_id,
  'proof' AS source
FROM proof_tracker.proof_changes pc
WHERE pc.detected_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND pc.significance = 'major'

UNION ALL

-- Distribution changes
SELECT 
  experiment_surveillance.detect_pattern(
    'distribution_tracker',
    'distribution_changes',
    dc.id,
    dc.company_id,
    'integrations',
    dc.change_type,
    dc.change_details
  ) AS pattern_id,
  'distribution' AS source
FROM distribution_tracker.distribution_changes dc
WHERE dc.detected_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND dc.significance = 'major';

-- Update survival tracking for all active patterns
SELECT experiment_surveillance.update_survival_tracking();

-- Get patterns that need evaluation
SELECT 
  id,
  pattern_key,
  pattern_label,
  pattern_category,
  status,
  survivorship_score,
  propagation_score,
  combined_score,
  first_seen,
  last_seen
FROM experiment_surveillance.patterns
WHERE status IN ('candidate', 'emerging')
  AND updated_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY combined_score DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Emit proven pattern signals
SELECT experiment_surveillance.emit_proven_patterns() AS proven_count;

-- Emit emerging pattern signals
SELECT experiment_surveillance.emit_emerging_patterns() AS emerging_count;

-- Get summary stats
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment_surveillance.patterns) AS total_patterns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment_surveillance.patterns WHERE status = 'proven') AS proven_patterns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment_surveillance.patterns WHERE status = 'emerging') AS emerging_patterns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment_surveillance.pattern_instances WHERE observed_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') AS instances_this_week,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment_surveillance.signal_emissions WHERE week_start = date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE) AS signals_emitted;
